Highlights/Specialty
We are known as a strong agency Lender with a combination of great pricing & minimal overlays (especially on VA & FHA)
Our FHA/VA Products have a minimum FICO of 580 (Freedom to Freedom loans = 550 minimum Fico)
No Max DTI with an AUS Approval on our VA and FHA products (FHA- No Manual UW)
We allow for VA Manual Underwrites up to a 41% DTI (43% max with a 120% required residual)
We are the best at Million Dollar VA Loans! No max loan amount on VA purchases up to 100% LTV. Yes that means a $3 mil VA purchase up to 100% LTV!
Need a VA loan with a co-borrower that isn’t a spouse? Partial or Dual Eligibility? We do VA Joint loans!
We do VA Cash Out up to 100% LTV (Conforming and Jumbo loan amounts) **Best Priced**
Our Condo Project Review Desk will order and pay for the condo docs for review and approval

VA IRRRL’s & FHA Streamlines: No appraisal (or drive-by), No income, No employment or assets on 1003, and only need a “mtg only” credit report with FICOs. Fair & easy guidelines, No Verbal VOE, or Collateral requirements! (FHA Streamline: 1 mo reserves required if cash to close exceeds piti)
Additional Good News on IRRRL’s:
Mortgage lates on credit? May be ok – ask me!
Have a HERO/PACE lien you don’t want to payoff? We can do it without a subordination.
Recent forbearance and don’t want to wait 6 pmts after? Ask me!
1-Touch Submission Checklist for IRRRLs - Click here
Turn-times are excellent! 1-3 days from submission to U/W decision on all our products! Need a 21-day Purchase? We can do it!
LE Discl Pkg needs to be input and issued from the Freedom website within 3 days of registration (brokered loans only)
We do early CD’s for all products!
